stemHtml:
Select the service provided by ATS unit at B, taking into account the following reports:

ATS unit A: “G-CD, cleared to cross A1 at Wicken”
ATS unit B: “G-CD, suggest right heading 120 degrees”

options.a: Air Traffic Control Service, with the same degree of safety as unit A.
options.b: Air Traffic Advisory Service, with reduced safety compared to unit A.
options.c: Air Traffic Control Service, with increased safety compared to unit A.
options.d: Alerting Service, with reduced safety compared to unit A.
